Created attachment 238908
[NEW PORT] www/gau : fetches known URLs - port

gau  - getallurls (gau) fetches known URLs
       from AlienVault's Open Threat Exchange,
       the Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, and
       URLScan for any given domain.

WWW: https://github.com/lc/gau/
